reviews.review_msg: This course is actually terrible. While the assignments are not hard, they are EXTREMELY tedious, and can take hours to do since he wants you to HAND WRITE everything. It is so annoying. I am about to graduate and this is most likely the most boring and pointless course I have ever taken. Unless if you are a masochist do not take.
Avoid......It's not worth spending money and time on taking this class
Pointless course. Dont feel like I learnt anything. There's a group project, would be better off just doing an ML project on your own time.
